channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed

- Pro-Iran hackers hit US medical device giant in shocking cyberattack after Israel strikes
- Iran-linked hackers take credit for cyberattack on US medical equipment company Stryker
- Stryker cyber attack: Has Iran added a new dimension to the US-Iran war? Why Iran-linked hackers targeted $100 billion medical giant Stryker Corp as stock crashed 4.5%
- Stryker cyber attack: Which Iranian hacker group is suspected behind the breach and why did Iran choose a global medical device giant for a wiper malware attack amid the US-Iran war?
- Stryker Cyber Attack: Did Iranian-linked hackers use wiper malware to shut down Cork systems and disrupt global medical device production? 4,000 workers offline in suspected wiper attack
- Stryker hit with global cyberattack by suspected Iranian-backed group, thousands of workers affected at Cork plants]]>

item.title: U.S. has ‘practically nothing left to target’ in Iran, says Trump: report
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump claims US has destroyed much of Iran’s military capabilities
- Trump tells Kentucky rally Iran’s military and nuclear capabilities degraded
- US has destroyed over 5,000 Iranian targets, including 60 ships, since start of Operation Epic Fury
- US has ‘practically nothing left to target’ in Iran, Trump says]]>

item.title: 12 days: How 2025 Iran blueprint trapped US, Israel in longer war
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- What to know about possible endgames of U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran?
- Netanyahu’s Lifelong Obsession with Striking Iran and His Looming Spectacular Defeat
- Sensing US on cusp of pulling plug on Iran operation, Israel to ramp up attacks — media
- The US-Israeli strategy failed to defeat Iran quickly – now they are moving to plan B | Paul Rogers]]>

item.title: North Korea tests missiles amid reports of US moving arms to West Asia
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Seoul says it can deter Pyongyang even if Washington transfers weapons to the Middle East
- Seoul says it can deter threats from North Korea even if US weapons shifted to Middle East
- Seoul Says Can Deter Threats From North If US Weapons Shifted To Mideast
- Hasty redeployment of US missiles from South Korea to Middle East leaves Seoul rattled]]>

item.title: Six die in Swiss bus fire after man thought to have set himself alight
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- At least six dead after postal bus bursts into flames in ‌Switzerland’s Kerzers
- Fire engulfs a bus in Switzerland, killing 6 people and severely injuring 3 others
- Several dead after postal bus bursts into flames, authorities say
- Six die in Swiss bus blaze after man thought to have set fire to himself
- Police investigating Swiss bus fire that killed six rule out terrorist motive for now
- At least 6 people killed, 3 hospitalized with severe injuries after bus catches fire west of Swiss capital, police say
- Six die in Swiss bus blaze after reports of person setting themselves on fire - The Standard (HK)
- Swiss bus fire killing six 'intentional,' police say
- Bus fire in Switzerland leaves at least 6 dead, 4 injured
- Six killed in Swiss bus fire after suspected self-immolation (VIDEO)
- A bus fire that killed 6 people could have been set deliberately, Swiss police say
- A bus fire that killed 6 people could have been set deliberately, Swiss police say
- Fire Engulfs Bus in Switzerland, Killing 6 People and Severely Injuring 3 Others]]>

- Trump Said Iran 'Welcome To Compete' In World Cup, Says Infantino

- Trump administration estimates Iran war cost at over $11 billion in six days, source says
- Trump administration estimates Iran war cost at over $11 billion in six days, source says - Reuters

- First Week of Iran War Cost More Than $11 Billion, Pentagon Tells Congress

- U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
